meta.description: An opinionated full-stack template: React Router SSR, .NET Aspire, and a typed API client.

hero.subtitle: A starting point for full-stack apps with server-side rendering, i18n, and a typed API boundary.

blurb: This template wires up a React Router SSR frontend to a .NET API through a generated, Zod-validated client. Loaders and actions talk to the API only on the server (ADR-0003). The two example pages below show the pattern end to end.

greetings.title: Greetings
greetings.body: List and create greetings — a minimal read/write feature.

widgets.title: Widgets
widgets.body: List and create widgets with a name and quantity.
